title: Chausath Yogini Temple, Mitaoli
tagline: Chausath Yogini Temple, Mitaoli — spiritual town of Madhya Pradesh

heroImage.alt: Chausath Yogini Temple, Mitaoli, Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: The Chausath Yogini Temple, Mitaoli, also known as Ekattarso Mahadeva Temple, is an 11th-century temple in Morena district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh.
overview.description: The Chausath Yogini Temple, Mitaoli, also known as Ekattarso Mahadeva Temple, is an 11th-century temple in Morena district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. Build during Kachchhapaghata reign, it is one of the well-preserved Yogini temples in India. The temple is formed by a circular wall with 65 chambers, apparently for 64 yoginis and the goddess Devi, and an open mandapa in the centre of a circular courtyard, sacred to Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Bateshwar Hindu temples, Madhya Pradesh
topPlaces.description: The Bateshwar Hindu temples (romanised: baṭeśvar; /bəʈeːɕvər/) are a group of nearly 200 sandstone Hindu temples and their ruins in north Madhya Pradesh in post-Gupta, early Gurjara-Pratihara style of North Indian temple architecture. It is about 35 kilometres (22 mi) north of Gwalior and about 30 kilometres (19 mi) east of Morena town.

topPlaces.name: Endori
topPlaces.description: Endori (also known as Endouri) is a village in Bhind district, Madhya Pradesh, India. Khaneta, Sherpur and Chandokharand are nearby.

topPlaces.name: Bamhora
topPlaces.description: Bamhora is a village in the Bhopal district of Madhya Pradesh, India. It is located in the Berasia tehsil.

topPlaces.name: Malanpur
topPlaces.description: Malanpur is an Industrial Area in Bhind District of Madhya Pradesh, being managed by the Madhya Pradesh Industrial Infrastructure Development Corporation (Formerly known as AKVN Gwalior).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chausath Yogini Temple, Mitaoli?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chausath Yogini Temple, Mitaoli is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chausath Yogini Temple, Mitaoli?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Gwalior Airport (16 km) and the nearest railway station is Gwalior Junction (25 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chausath Yogini Temple, Mitaoli?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chausath Yogini Temple, Mitaoli at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chausath Yogini Temple, Mitaoli?
faq.a: Stays in Chausath Yogini Temple, Mitaoli start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chausath Yogini Temple, Mitaoli?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bateshwar Hindu temples, Madhya Pradesh, Endori, Bamhora, Malanpur.
